description: Restore always-visible review notes by rendering annotations for files in the current viewport instead of only the selected hunk; semantics now match mouse-scrolling review, but the old benchmark regresses to 784.66ms under that broader note policy.

name: Optimize viewport-scoped visible notes large split stream scroll

description: Baseline after restoring viewport-scoped visible notes rather than selected-hunk-only notes; under the broader visible-note policy the current 18-tick large-stream scroll cost is 2009.15ms.
